What We Offer

Powered by Fiber. Built for Everyone.

From homes streaming in 4K to enterprises running mission-critical operations — OFTiX delivers.

⚡

Blazing Fast Internet Speeds

Symmetrical upload and download speeds via our direct fiber-optic backbone — no throttling, no congestion.

🛡️

Network Security

Built-in DDoS protection, firewall management, and encrypted traffic to keep your data safe at all times.

🌐

Business Internet

Dedicated lines, static IPs, and SLA-backed connectivity tailored for enterprises and growing businesses.

🎧

24/7 Support

Real humans, real solutions. Our local support team is available around the clock via chat, call, or email.

Our Purpose

Mission

OFTiX Network Inc. is committed to connecting every Filipino with the digital infrastructure they deserve.

01

Providing high-quality, fiber-powered internet services that ensure speed, stability, and seamless online experiences for every subscriber.

02

Building a customer-first culture, delivering responsive support and dependable solutions tailored to both households and businesses.

03

Continuously innovating through advanced technologies and network upgrades that keep our services secure and future-ready.

04

Expanding digital access to underserved areas, helping bridge the digital divide across the Philippines.

05

Operating with integrity and excellence, fostering sustainable growth and strong partnerships with stakeholders and communities.

Our Vision

Where We're Headed

"

To be the most trusted and innovative digital connectivity provider, delivering fast, reliable, and future-ready network solutions that empower communities, businesses, and every Filipino to thrive in a connected world.

Who We Are

Connecting the Philippines, One Fiber at a Time

OFTiX Network Inc. is a Philippine-based internet service provider dedicated to delivering enterprise-grade fiber connectivity to homes, schools, businesses, and communities across the archipelago.

We believe fast, reliable internet is not a luxury — it is the foundation for education, economic growth, and opportunity. That is why we invest in cutting-edge infrastructure and a support team that truly cares.

From metro hubs to underserved provinces, OFTiX is building the digital backbone that the Philippines deserves.

Fiber Optic Low Latency No Data Cap PH-Based Support Scalable Plans
